summary: Frontend-only testing of out-of-stock product handling in POS and blacklist management in Customers page. All 5 main features tested and working correctly.

issues: Console warnings: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - should add DialogDescription for accessibility

passed_tests.feature: POS search dropdown - Out-of-stock product gradient background
passed_tests.details: Out-of-stock products show with gradient yellow-orange background (from-amber-100 to-orange-100), AlertTriangle icon, and 'غير متوفر' badge

passed_tests.feature: POS - Adding out-of-stock products to cart
passed_tests.details: Successfully added out-of-stock product (samsung s22 ultra) to cart. Warning toast displayed: 'تنبيه: هذا المنتج غير متوفر - سيتم حساب المخزون بالسالب'
Toggle with data-testid='blacklist-filter-switch' found and working. Label shows 'القائمة السوداء فقط'
Badge shows '1 محظور' (1 blocked) when blacklist entries exist

passed_tests.feature: Customer cards - Shield buttons for blacklist management
passed_tests.details: Shield icon (block-customer-xxx) appears for customers WITH phone numbers. ShieldOff icon (unblock-customer-xxx) appears for blacklisted customers. Tested both block and unblock flows.
Dialog shows customer info, reason dropdown with 5 options (عدم الدفع, سلوك سيء, احتيال, إرجاع متكرر, أخرى), and confirm button

conditionally_passed_tests.details: Feature implemented correctly in code (lines 838-917 in POSPage.js). Panel only shows when debtReminders.length > 0. Currently no debts exist in system so panel is not visible, but code logic is correct.

critical_code_review_comments: Out-of-stock product styling correctly implemented with gradient from-amber-100 to-orange-100
AlertTriangle icon properly used for out-of-stock indication
Blacklist management buttons (Shield/ShieldOff) only appear for customers with phone numbers - correct business logic
Blacklist filter toggle properly filters customer list
Minor: Add DialogDescription to dialogs for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created test customer 'Test Customer With Phone' with phone 0555123456 for testing blacklist functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working: 1) POS out-of-stock products show gradient background + AlertTriangle icon + badge, 2) Can add out-of-stock products to cart (shows warning), 3) Customers page has blacklist filter toggle, 4) Blacklist badge shows count, 5) Shield/ShieldOff buttons appear on customer cards WITH phone numbers only, 6) Debt reminders panel code exists but no debts in system to display.

Customers Blacklist Management.block_button: data-testid='block-customer-{id}' with Shield icon - WORKING (only for customers with phone)
Customers Blacklist Management.blacklist_dialog: Shows customer info + reason dropdown + confirm button - WORKING
Customers Blacklist Management.reason_options: 5 options: عدم الدفع, سلوك سيء, احتيال, إرجاع متكرر, أخرى - WORKING

Debt Reminders Panel.current_state: No debts in system, panel not visible (expected behavior)
